user.title: Connect to LTA DataMall
user.description: Enter the AccountKey from your LTA DataMall account. It is stored only in this integration entry and used only to call LTA's APIs.

error.invalid_auth: The AccountKey was rejected by LTA DataMall.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach LTA DataMall. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This LTA DataMall AccountKey is already configured.

menu_options.add_ev_postal: Add an EV charging location (by postal code)
menu_options.add_crowd_line: Add a train line (station crowd density)

add_bus_stop.title: Add a bus stop
add_bus_stop.description: 5-digit bus stop code, e.g. {example}. Leave the service number blank to track every service at this stop.

add_carpark.title: Add a carpark
add_carpark.description: CarParkID as published by LTA/URA/HDB, e.g. {example}.

add_bicycle_parking.title: Add a bicycle parking point
add_bicycle_parking.description: Bicycle parking racks within a radius of this point will be tracked.

add_crowd_line.title: Add a train line
add_crowd_line.description: A sensor will be created for every station on this line automatically.

add_camera.title: Add a traffic camera
add_camera.description: CameraID, e.g. {example}. See Annex G of the LTA DataMall API guide for a location list.

abort.no_trackers: There are no trackers configured to remove.
